item.title: we all need more whimsy
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Friends from work tax
siblings
silly boy
handsome boy
boop incoming
do you hear what I hear
the best floofy boy MV Edit- this post has the best comments ever - I love hearing everyone’s little things they do - humans can be so neat ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

item.dc:creator: nickontop

item.title: Just an FYI post, you can use these without being a runner.
item.dc:creator: SpriteandCats

item.title: Yay!
item.description: ...by an extrovert ....in our 30s. I live alone, live away from my family and occasionally go to community events for enjoyment. The closest thing I have to a romantic partner, travels about 50% of the time for work and we don't live together--and am completly content. Now a group of people, instead of one-offs know me (who me?). I got included on a team at adult dodgeball league instead of being a drop-in. People recgonize me from week-to week; and when I miss a week (!?). Im even in my first group chat. When I start to get quiet or lost in the shuffle my extrovert suggests things to the group to include me or tells me to reach out to this person or that. I am a little uncomfortable with how infantizing it sometimes is, and am unsure how long this will last with me being in this life and/or them putting in the work so I have to figure out quickly if I like it and if I do, how to sustain it. But it's kinda cool now and I appreciate someone thinking of me and sharing what brings them joy. Always thought the being adopted by an extrovert meme was a joke, dramatizing friends just being quieter or more talkative but it's a thing and I am eternality grateful for being able to try on a new type of life if only temporary. Sorry too mushy?
item.dc:creator: Raecracy123abc

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Wonder Woman Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: Wanted to paint Wonder Woman again, I thought the lyrics were very fitting for the world and wanted to do something with it :) Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror I use professional body paint covers this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle I did not go to art school, I am self taught. I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007 If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am British I do not go outside like this to scare people I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life If you're still here I have now recovered from my cold! I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these / I am “pretending” to paint myself
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: We're sorry we're not able to deliver!.

item.title: Detroit was flooded and it froze over night. Cars are stuck.
item.dc:creator: Whispersaf

item.title: What Happened Today #19
item.description: Trans rights gutted. IRS mass firings. Pentagon purges. Federal takeovers. Health funding slashed. Meanwhile, hundreds rallied in D.C. to fight back. Will you? LINKS 1 - https://www.upi.com/Health_News/2025/02/19/HHS-Kennedy-biological-truth-sexes/7181740003452/ 2 - https://www.govexec.com/workforce/2025/02/irs-expected-fire-6700-employees-beginning-thursday/403122/ 3 - https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/hegseth-fire-remove-generals-senior-officers-us-officials/story?id=118985348 4 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-md-va/2025/02/19/trump-justice-operation-whirlwind-democrats/ 5 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdjywvne2k9o 6 - https://www.nytimes.com/live/2025/02/19/us/trump-news 7 - https://apnews.com/article/trump-washington-crime-homeless-home-rule-congress-5e34be44cb3bebae76dcb81743b3e31d 8 - https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-20/trump-to-sign-order-blocking-federal-funds-from-illegal-migrants?srnd=phx-politics 9 - https://wtop.com/dc/2025/02/hundreds-gather-at-hhs-to-protest-nih-academic-research-cuts/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Even the UK's most right-wing newspapers are running anti-Trump articles this morning
item.description:
The Daily Mail, a.k.a. The Daily Heil
From the Daily Telegraph
Yeah, I know the Mirror isn’t a right-wing rag
This one is
The Sun avoided the subject on its front page
item.dc:creator: Dartfordian1

item.title: Illinois Governor JB Pritzker: "What comes next?"
item.description:
Source: https://bsky.app/profile/youranoncentral.bsky.social/post/3lim2jbjr722v
My main priority is to give authors the recognition they deserve, provide the logo of the source and the date the article was written. If there is an article that seems important but you cannot read, do not give up. Copy the title and put it in a search engine to find and alternative source that has pulled that story's text. archive.ph often allows you to put an address to the article to bypass this. To make things even simpler, there are block lists that you can add to UBlock to open these documents directly. You can use these links on PC, Mac and Android. You can drop this filter list directly into UBlock and it will allow you through (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liamengland1/miscfilters/refs/heads/master/antipaywall.txt). This list is updated regularly, with an update just two days ago. I will provide a video that shows how to do this however, due to the compression methods here, it shows up a bit low quality but it is enough to easily figure it out. (https://imgur.com/gallery/land-of-free-to-yuh-72f1Fuq) It's recommended to use a browser other than Chrome in order to navigate. Recently, Google has been combatting against ad blockers (convenient, huh?) and from what I understand, they have removed extensions. Some on previous versions may still have access but it is only temporary and deemed unreliable on that basis. --------------------------------------------------------------------- http://old.reddit.com/r/politics https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/new/ (latest; often unverified. Be cautious) --------------------------------------------------------------------- NeatURL is an extension to help remove clutter and tracking from urls (https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/neat-url/). ClearURL is also an alternative (however I haven't tried it, it's #1 in the store) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/clearurls/ If you're okay with manually enabling/disabling what is displayed, I recommend NoScript Security Suite to put full control into your hands. Note, it can be bothersome at first, but once you set permissions on each page that you visit frequently, you don't have to mess around with doing it over and over. Protection isn't meant to be convenient in this age, unfortunately. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript/ XCancelled will forward you to Twitter comments outside of the environment, allowing you to view information without being signed in. This is incredibly useful for news stories that contain "Tweets" so you can see their comments or download videos from their sources (with other tools) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/nitter/ Load Reddit Images Directly does just that. Rather than clicking an image to slowly have it converted to a different format (many times unusable and needs to be converted back resulting in degradation), it will open in a new tab as .jpg https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/load-reddit-images-directly/ Chrome Mask will trick sites into thinking you're using Chrome for certain tasks. YouTube is a good example- to combat adblockers, they have limited their videos to those who they detect are using browsers that allow adblockers. There is a toggle switch for how you would like your browser to be announced. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/chrome-mask Onetab is also useful but you can end up with tons and tons to "look over later" as I often do. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/onetab/ Tab session manager- same as above. (I also have a hundreds here that I haven't gotten around to) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tab-session-manager/ For editing posts, if you do not have Photoshop, there is a browser-based alternative you can use completely for free with (practically) all of the bells and whistles. https://www.photopea.com/ If there is text on the screen and you cannot copy it, try Text-Grab. (my hotkey is alt+f) https://github.com/TheJoeFin/Text-Grab --------------------------------------------------------------------- MORE STORIES FROM YESTERDAY (Imported from previous post) --------------------------------------------------------------------- The Moscow Institute of Computer Science has "caught fire", I felt a great disturbance in the algorithm, as if millions of bots suddenly cried out in terror and were suddenly silenced. https://bsky.app/profile/youranoncentral.bsky.social/post/3lilg37cgj22i We are on the road for democracy and justice - Bernie Sanders https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2025/feb/19/trumpism-bernie-sanders The 50-Year-Old Law That Could Stop DOGE in Its Tracks—Maybe (Wired) https://archive.ph/5AseU#selection-555.0-555.60 Bannon: Musk ‘wants to impose his freak experiments’ on US https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5150832-steve-bannon-elon-musk-doge/ Donald Trump’s New Executive Order Sparks Fierce Backlash: ‘Full-Blown Power Grab’ https://www.huffpost.com/entry/donald-trump-new-executive-order-slammed_n_67b58c15e4b04083cc995e08 Trump Signs New Order to Vastly Expand His Presidential Powers https://www.thedailybeast.com/trump-signs-new-order-to-vastly-expand-his-presidential-powers/\ Trump Signs Order Giving White House Control Over Independent Agencies https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/trump-signs-order-giving-white-house-control-over-independent-agencies-a46091e0 Republicans Happily Roll Over as Trump Declares Himself King https://newrepublic.com/post/191718/republicans-donald-trump-king-congestion-pricing Axios Hill Leaders "Dictator" fallout https://www.axios.com/newsletters/axios-hill-leaders-63e37bc0-eeec-11ef-bd8b-f5ea20df8ddd.html?stream=top Poll: Majority of GOP voters would reject checks, balances to give Trump more power https://www.msnbc.com/msnbc/amp/shows/maddow/blog/rcna192602 Indiana man charged with threatening Elon Musk on X arrested for felony intimidation https://fox59.com/indiana-news/indiana-man-charged-with-threatening-elon-musk-on-x-arrested-for-felony-intimidation/ Trump says Zelensky ‘should have never started’ war with Russia https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5151545-trump-ukraine-zelensky-war-russia/ Anti-Trump Podcast Dethrones Joe Rogan at Top of the Charts https://www.thedailybeast.com/anti-trump-podcast-dethrones-joe-rogan-at-top-of-the-charts/ The Trump Administration Is Going After Our Elections Too https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2025/02/trump-doge-layoffs-project-2025-election-security-cisa-firing.html Trump says ‘inflation is back’: ‘I had nothing to do with it’ https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5152657-donald-trump-rising-inflation-doge-tariffs-economy/ Trump Just Endorsed Sweeping Medicaid Cuts https://newrepublic.com/post/191703/trump-endorses-medicaid-cuts-tax-cuts-rich Fired FAA employee who was working on missile defense says Americans should be scared https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/19/politics/video/faa-employee-fired-americans-scared-missile-defense-digvid Two more staffers quit John Fetterman's office as the senator carves his own lane with Trump https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/two-staffers-quit-john-fetterman-office-rcna192804 11-Year-Old Texas Girl Bullied Over Family's Immigration Status Takes Her Own Life https://www.latintimes.com/11-year-old-texas-girl-bullied-over-familys-immigration-status-takes-her-own-life-575984 White House posts video of immigrants in shackles, calls deportation footage 'ASMR' https://www.cnbc.com/2025/02/18/white-house-x-immigrants-deportation-shackles-asmr-video.html Sanders Has a Message for Working-Class Trump Supporters: 'They're Going After You' https://www.commondreams.org/news/bernie-sanders-warning-trump-supporters Hamas Offers to Free All Hostages for Israel’s Gaza Withdrawal https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-18/hamas-offers-to-free-all-hostages-for-israel-s-gaza-withdrawal?accessToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJTdWJzY3JpYmVyR2lmdGVkQXJ0aWNsZSIsImlhdCI6MTczOTkyNTM4MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQwNTMwMTgwLCJhcnRpY2xlSWQiOiJTUldEOFJEV0xVNjgwMCIsImJjb25uZWN0SWQiOiJFOURENjUxQUFBN0Q0MEFFQUU2QzRGMTY2Q0JCRkJFNCJ9.-A_02N9uejMAJ9Yi016_uWbXh53GRZVnYBKtxLIdsOI&leadSource=reddit_wall USDA says it accidentally fired officials working on bird flu and is trying to rehire them https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/doge/usda-accidentally-fired-officials-bird-flu-rehire-rcna192716 Privacy advocates file lawsuit to stop DOGE from peeking at IRS taxpayer data https://www.npr.org/2025/02/18/nx-s1-5300826/doge-irs-lawsuit-taxpayers-data --------------------------------------------------------------------- Stay in the Fight! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/thank-you-for-taking-action-stay-in-the-fight/ Keep up with current threats: https://www.realtimefascism.com/ How far along are we to fascism? https://www.project2025.observer/ Another useful sub: https://old.reddit.com/r/Keep_Track/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: This always cracks me up
item.description: 1st interview done! I'll (hopefully) hear back from them by the end of the week. EDIT: I GOT A DISHWASHER JOB FOR 3 WEEKS FUCKYEAAAAAHHHH THOSE PLATES ARE GONNA SHINE BRIGHTER THAN MY FUTURE. -- Just over 2 weeks until I get any welfare help. Homeless until then. If you feel you can help, please check my bio or reach out by DM. Any help at all is sincerely appreciated. Be excellent to each other x
item.dc:creator: Skeebeedeebop

item.description: Source: https://www.tiktok.com/@novaramedia/video/7472428178011671830?_r=1&_t=ZT-8u4Atg4XdK2 --------------------------------------------------------------------- MORE STORIES FROM YESTERDAY & TODAY (Imported from previous post) --------------------------------------------------------------------- The Moscow Institute of Computer Science has "caught fire", I felt a great disturbance in the algorithm, as if millions of bots suddenly cried out in terror and were suddenly silenced. https://bsky.app/profile/youranoncentral.bsky.social/post/3lilg37cgj22i We are on the road for democracy and justice - Bernie Sanders https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2025/feb/19/trumpism-bernie-sanders The 50-Year-Old Law That Could Stop DOGE in Its Tracks—Maybe (Wired) https://archive.ph/5AseU#selection-555.0-555.60 Bannon: Musk ‘wants to impose his freak experiments’ on US https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5150832-steve-bannon-elon-musk-doge/ Donald Trump’s New Executive Order Sparks Fierce Backlash: ‘Full-Blown Power Grab’ https://www.huffpost.com/entry/donald-trump-new-executive-order-slammed_n_67b58c15e4b04083cc995e08 Trump Signs New Order to Vastly Expand His Presidential Powers https://www.thedailybeast.com/trump-signs-new-order-to-vastly-expand-his-presidential-powers/\ Trump Signs Order Giving White House Control Over Independent Agencies https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/trump-signs-order-giving-white-house-control-over-independent-agencies-a46091e0 Republicans Happily Roll Over as Trump Declares Himself King https://newrepublic.com/post/191718/republicans-donald-trump-king-congestion-pricing Axios Hill Leaders "Dictator" fallout https://www.axios.com/newsletters/axios-hill-leaders-63e37bc0-eeec-11ef-bd8b-f5ea20df8ddd.html?stream=top Poll: Majority of GOP voters would reject checks, balances to give Trump more power https://www.msnbc.com/msnbc/amp/shows/maddow/blog/rcna192602 Indiana man charged with threatening Elon Musk on X arrested for felony intimidation https://fox59.com/indiana-news/indiana-man-charged-with-threatening-elon-musk-on-x-arrested-for-felony-intimidation/ Trump says Zelensky ‘should have never started’ war with Russia https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5151545-trump-ukraine-zelensky-war-russia/ Anti-Trump Podcast Dethrones Joe Rogan at Top of the Charts https://www.thedailybeast.com/anti-trump-podcast-dethrones-joe-rogan-at-top-of-the-charts/ The Trump Administration Is Going After Our Elections Too https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2025/02/trump-doge-layoffs-project-2025-election-security-cisa-firing.html Trump says ‘inflation is back’: ‘I had nothing to do with it’ https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5152657-donald-trump-rising-inflation-doge-tariffs-economy/ Trump Just Endorsed Sweeping Medicaid Cuts https://newrepublic.com/post/191703/trump-endorses-medicaid-cuts-tax-cuts-rich Fired FAA employee who was working on missile defense says Americans should be scared https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/19/politics/video/faa-employee-fired-americans-scared-missile-defense-digvid Two more staffers quit John Fetterman's office as the senator carves his own lane with Trump https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/two-staffers-quit-john-fetterman-office-rcna192804 11-Year-Old Texas Girl Bullied Over Family's Immigration Status Takes Her Own Life https://www.commondreams.org/news/bernie-sanders-warning-trump-supporters Hamas Offers to Free All Hostages for Israel’s Gaza Withdrawal https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-18/hamas-offers-to-free-all-hostages-for-israel-s-gaza-withdrawal?accessToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJTdWJzY3JpYmVyR2lmdGVkQXJ0aWNsZSIsImlhdCI6MTczOTkyNTM4MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQwNTMwMTgwLCJhcnRpY2xlSWQiOiJTUldEOFJEV0xVNjgwMCIsImJjb25uZWN0SWQiOiJFOURENjUxQUFBN0Q0MEFFQUU2QzRGMTY2Q0JCRkJFNCJ9.-A_02N9uejMAJ9Yi016_uWbXh53GRZVnYBKtxLIdsOI&leadSource=reddit_wall advocates file lawsuit to stop DOGE from peeking at IRS taxpayer data https://www.npr.org/2025/02/18/nx-s1-5300826/doge-irs-lawsuit-taxpayers-data --------------------------------------------------------------------- Stay in the Fight! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/thank-you-for-taking-action-stay-in-the-fight/ Keep up with current threats: https://www.realtimefascism.com/ How far along are we to fascism? https://www.project2025.observer/ Another useful sub: https://old.reddit.com/r/Keep_Track/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Keep up with everything happening here: https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/ https://old.reddit.com/r/fednews/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook

item.title: Mid Day Dump
item.description:
I like to send pins to a friend who absolutely hates them
But how do I get out?!
Not once
Help
